data.title: Momcozy Portable Bottle Warmer for Travel – Dual Heating Modes for Breast Milk & Water, Portable Milk Warmer with Fast Heatin

features: 𝐅𝐚𝐬𝐭 𝐇𝐞𝐚𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐍𝐮𝐭𝐫𝐢𝐞𝐧𝐭𝐬 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐬𝐞𝐫𝐯𝐞𝐝: Warm 4oz of water to 104°F in just 2 minutes or breast milk to 98°F in 5 minutes. Your baby’s milk will be ready before the tears start. Moreover
its even heating system could help to preserve most of nutrients of breastmilk.
𝐃𝐮𝐚𝐥 𝐌𝐨𝐝𝐞𝐬 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐏𝐫𝐞𝐜𝐢𝐬𝐞 𝐓𝐞𝐦𝐩𝐞𝐫𝐚𝐭𝐮𝐫𝐞 𝐂𝐨𝐧𝐭𝐫𝐨𝐥: Choose between breast milk warming (90
122°F). These precise options meet your diverse feeding needs and allowing you to easily warm milk or prepare formula
giving you peace of mind every time.
𝐏𝐨𝐫𝐭𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 & 𝐄𝐚𝐬𝐲 𝐭𝐨 𝐂𝐚𝐫𝐫𝐲: You can slip this cordless bottle warmer into your diaper bag or car cup holder. Take it with you to the park
or even on family trips—it’s always ready when you are.
you’ll have enough for multiple feedings
perfect for all-day feeding needs. Whether you have one baby or more
you can stay confident knowing you won’t run out during the day.
𝐋𝐨𝐧𝐠-𝐋𝐚𝐬𝐭𝐢𝐧𝐠 𝐑𝐞𝐜𝐡𝐚𝐫𝐠𝐞𝐚𝐛𝐥𝐞 𝐁𝐚𝐭𝐭𝐞𝐫𝐲: On a single charge
you can warm 4oz of water up to 19 times or milk up to 8 times. With 1.5-hour fast charging
this wireless design keeps your bottle warmer ready whenever and wherever you need it—no outlets required.
leak-proof lid keeps water or milk safely sealed
so you don’t have to worry about spills in your diaper bag or car. Carry it with confidence—every drop stays where it should.
